description: You are a software engineer at a logistics company. The 'barcode_encoder' library used for generating shipping labels is producing invalid barcodes, causing a 15% read failure rate in the warehouse. Fix the bugs in the library located at ~/PycharmProjects/barcode_encoder, specifically addressing issues with the UPC-A check digit calculation, the Code 128 checksum, and the Code 128 stop pattern. Ensure the library passes its test suite. Do not modify the test files or the lookup tables.
